events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Celebrating the legend that is Lionel Richie as he turns 77! What's your favourite Lionel track to get the party started?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the iconic Cyndi Lauper! Her vibrant style and powerful voice defined an era. What's your go-to Cyndi classic?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter George Michael was born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: A True Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to touch millions. What's your favourite George Michael song?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Michael Jackson, the 'King of Pop', passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King Of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His groundbreaking music and iconic performances left an indelible mark on the world. What's your favourite MJ moment?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Peace And Love
angles.copy: Sending peace and love to Ringo Starr as he celebrates his 86th birthday! A true legend of rock and roll.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! His iconic riffs have inspired generations. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: The one and only Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today! Six decades of rock and roll energy. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's Launch
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! A definitive album that launched a Britpop phenomenon. What's your anthem from this classic?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Three Days Of Peace
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, the Woodstock Festival began, bringing together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: King Of Rock And Roll
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy continues to shake, rattle, and roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Shooting
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day, we remember Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation. His impact on music and culture remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK and October 1, 1969, in the US.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs – pure magic. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The voice of The Pretenders, still rocking after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Liam Gallagher's 54th birthday! The unmistakable voice of a generation. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or Oasis?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the release of John Lennon's timeless anthem, 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Anniversary of the First iPod Release
events.blurb: Apple first unveiled the iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available for purchase on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the day music changed forever? The first iPod was announced on October 23, 2001, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over 60 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song? Licence to thrill!
